# flags

**Instance Property**

A collection of environmental effects to include in the output.

## Declaration

```swift
var flags: PHASESpatialPipeline.Flags { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value of this property to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialPipeline/init(flags:)] argument.

## Inspecting Effects

- **entries**: Audio layers for environmental effects to add to the output.
